description: Stat definitions - controls how stats are stored, transmitted, saved, displayed on items, and how they interact via operators for derived bonuses.

stat.description: Stat name identifier used by the engine for lookup

send other.description: Whether this stat is sent to other players

signed.description: Whether this stat value is treated as signed

send bits.description: Number of bits used when transmitting this stat over network

send param bits.description: Number of parameter bits sent with this stat

updateanimrate.description: Whether changing this stat updates animation rate

saved.description: Whether this stat is saved to character file

csvsigned.description: Whether CSV value is treated as signed

csvbits.description: Number of bits used in CSV storage

csvparam.description: Number of parameter bits in CSV storage

add.description: Value added to stat after multiply/divide

valshift.description: Bit shift applied to stat value

save bits.description: Number of bits used when saving this stat

save add.description: Value added before saving (bias for unsigned storage)

1.09-save bits.description: Number of save bits in 1.09 format (backwards compat)

1.09-save add.description: Save add value in 1.09 format (backwards compat)

minaccr.description: Minimum accrued value for this stat

fmin.description: Whether stat has a functional minimum

itemspecific.description: Whether this stat is item-specific (not transferable)

direct.description: Whether stat is applied directly without calculation

fcallback.description: Whether stat has a function callback on change

maxstat.description: Reference to stat that acts as the maximum for this stat

itemevent1.description: Event 1 that triggers this stat's item effect

itemeventfunc1.description: Function called when item event 1 fires

itemevent2.description: Event 2 that triggers this stat's item effect

itemeventfunc2.description: Function called when item event 2 fires

descpriority.description: Display priority for stat description sorting

descfunc.description: Description function ID for displaying stat value

descval.description: How the value is shown in description (0=none, 1=value, 2=percent)

descstrpos.description: String key for positive stat description

descstrneg.description: String key for negative stat description

descstr2.description: Secondary string key for stat description

dgrp.description: Description group ID for grouping related stats

dgrpstrpos.description: String key for positive group description

dgrpstrneg.description: String key for negative group description

dgrpstr2.description: Secondary string key for group description

keepzero.description: Whether to keep stat when value is zero

op.description: Operator type for derived stat calculation

op base.description: Base stat reference for operator calculation
